resources.string: 👋 Hi! I\'m SmolLM2, your on-device AI assistant. How can I help you today?
Bundled model files are missing from this build.
⚠ Bundled model files are missing. Please reinstall a build that includes model_q4.onnx and tokenizer.json in assets/smollm2.
Could you clarify what you want me to define?
I’m not fully sure what “it/that” refers to. Could you clarify the subject?
